title: Doilies, Beige Lace Handmade Crochet Doilies For Tables - Oval Lace Table Runner Doilies Cloth, Cotton Placemats, Knitted Coasters for Cups Coasters Glasses Small Doilies Cloth
features: Doilies for Furniture: Our handmade cotton crochet doilies are designed to protect your furniture from scratches while adding a touch of elegance to your home decor. Perfect for tables, dressers, and more.
Oval Placemats: These oval placemats are crafted from high-quality cotton, offering a soft and luxurious feel. Their unique design makes them ideal for both everyday use and special occasions.
Cotton Placemats: Made from a blend of cotton and polyester, these placemats are durable, washable, and reusable. They maintain their beauty and functionality over time, ensuring lasting elegance.
Lace Doilies: The intricate lace doilies pattern adds a vintage charm to any setting. Perfect for weddings, tea parties, or casual gatherings, they enhance the decor of any room.

Handmade Cotton Crochet Doilies: Each piece is carefully crafted by hand, ensuring a unique and sophisticated design. These doilies cloth are versatile, suitable for use as lace table runner, oval lace table runner doilies, or knitted coasters placemats.
description: Elegant Design for Every Occasion Our beige lace handmade crochet doilies for furniture are crafted with precision, offering a sophisticated touch to your dining table. These oval placemats are perfect for daily use, special events, or as a decorative accent in any room. The intricate lace doilies pattern adds a vintage charm, making them ideal for weddings, tea parties, or casual gatherings. Premium Quality Materials Made from a blend of cotton and polyester, these cotton placemats provide a soft, luxurious feel. The handmade cotton crochet doilies are durable, washable, and reusable, ensuring they maintain their beauty and functionality over time. The doilies cloth is designed to protect your furniture from scratches while enhancing your home decor. Versatile and Practical These lace crochet doilies are not just for tables; they can be used as a lace table runner, oval lace table runner doilies, or knitted coasters placemats. Their versatile design allows them to be used as small doilies cloth for cups, glasses, or other tabletop items. Whether you're decorating a bedroom, living room, or kitchen, these doilies add a touch of elegance to any setting. Perfect Size and Packaging Measuring 11.41 × 24.4 inches (29 × 62 cm), these oval placemats are perfectly sized for various tabletop items. Each piece is carefully packaged in a bag with dimensions of 26 × 18 × 1.5 cm, weighing 68 g. The packaging ensures the doilies arrive in pristine condition, ready to enhance your home decor. Enhance Your Home Decor Whether used as a decorative accent or for practical purposes, these lace doilies bring a warm and inviting ambiance to your home. Their timeless design complements any decor style, making them a must-have for anyone looking to add a touch of sophistication to their living space.
